ColumnsExplained: xpos_right = X coordinate on screen, right eye; ypos_right = Y coordinate on screen, right eye; pupil_right = Pupil size (a.u.), right eye, software detected blinks linearly interpolated using 0.05s before and 0.2s after a blink as buffer; event_trigger = Event onsets as also described in events.tsv; pupil_right_raw = Pupil size, right eye, without interpolation of blinks interpolated_bool = Whether this data point has been interpolated
